name: Browser Control
summary: Inspect and operate the user's current Chrome tabs through the local browser-connector CLI.

summaryI18n.en: Inspect and operate the user's current Chrome tabs through the local browser-connector CLI.
summaryI18n.zh: 通过本地 browser-connector CLI 查看并操作用户当前 Chrome 标签页。

description: Use this skill when the user wants the AI to list open Chrome tabs, read a current page, capture screenshots, or perform controlled browser interactions through the local browser-connector CLI, Chrome Extension, and Native Host. The skill guides installation, readiness checks, safe tab lease workflow, explicit confirmation for risky actions, and troubleshooting without treating browser control as a built-in NextClaw runtime.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants the AI to list open Chrome tabs, read a current page, capture screenshots, or perform controlled browser interactions through the local browser-connector CLI, Chrome Extension, and Native Host. The skill guides installation, readiness checks, safe tab lease workflow, explicit confirmation for risky actions, and troubleshooting without treating browser control as a built-in NextClaw runtime.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望 AI 列出当前 Chrome 标签页、读取当前页面、截图或执行受控浏览器交互时使用此技能。该技能通过本地 browser-connector CLI、Chrome Extension 与 Native Host 工作，并引导安装、就绪检查、安全 tab lease 流程、高风险动作显式确认与故障排查，同时明确浏览器控制不是 NextClaw 内置运行时。

author: NextClaw
